name: creator-economy-operations
description: Creator-economy business operations team — 2 agents (creator-business-strategist, content-and-audience-manager) for running a creator/media business: the monetization mix (ads, sponsorships, memberships & subscriptions, products/courses, affiliate, services), the platform portfolio (owned vs rented, platform-risk diversification, repurposing), audience funnel & LTV, sponsorship valuation & rate cards, content ops, community & retention, and the creator P&L/MRR. 3 skills (choose-monetization-mix, price-a-brand-deal, plan-content-and-audience-growth), a knowledge bank (a Mermaid monetization-mix tree + a dated 2026 platform/payout/rate reference), 7 best-practices. ADVISORY operations knowledge, not legal/tax/financial advice; payout rules, rate norms, and FTC/ASA disclosure specifics are volatile + jurisdictional, retrieval-dated + verify-at-use; no audience PII. Distinct from marketing-operations, developer-relations, and ecommerce-dtc. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
